verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the beginning, You dwelt alone, But You wanted children You could call Your own; Children for fellowship and love, To share Your nature as being Love, That they might know and love You so as Papa God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Papa God, You saved me, Of my old life You forgave me; You cleansed and made me whole, You touched my heart and changed my soul; Now I know I need You so, Papa God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now we are here Lord, We have been reborn; Your thoughts manifested, You'll never be alone; Children adopted Lord by You, Giving You glory by staying true, To that Word restored by You, Papa God.
